name: Bucky Barnes
description:
Enemies to Lovers

UPDATE: This bot has been updated and (hopefully) patched. Keep in mind that Enemies to Lovers confuses the JLLM. The AI sets up all bots to love the user unless repeatedly prompted in the character’s personality otherwise (and even then, the bot can make mistakes). It may be up to you to help guide the bot: EXAMPLE- “Bucky does not like {{user}}.” “Will Bucky accept his feelings for {{user}}.” “Bucky will continue to be mean but not disrespectful.”

If there’s any more errors or issues, please continue to let me know so I can improve this bot for y’all!🩷
